notes: Evals cover: (1) dispatch — QA intent routes to odoo-qa-suite, not to leaf skills directly; (2) test-case generation contract (business-rule-first, ETHOS#11, four mandatory paths); (3) checklist delegation contract (odoo-deploy-checklist dispatched, not inlined); (4) bug-triage contract (severity rules non-negotiable, structured output); (5) skip logic (no bugs → triage skipped cleanly); (6) should-not-fire boundary (pure code review, pure deploy gate). Each case has a precise expected_behavior so it can fail for the right reason.

evals.prompt: Write test cases and a deploy checklist for the custom_loyalty_program module on Odoo 17
evals.expected_behavior: Skill fires. Presents soft-plan-gate: generate-tests -> qa-checklist -> bug-triage. Does NOT skip straight to test generation before user approves the plan.
evals.must_not: Start writing test cases before the soft-plan-gate is acknowledged.

evals.prompt: Full QA suite for the sale module before our go-live next week
evals.expected_behavior: Skill fires. Recognises 'full QA suite' + 'before go-live' as the exact composition trigger. Presents three-phase plan.
evals.must_not: Route to odoo-deploy-checklist alone or odoo-code-review.

evals.prompt: QA pipeline for this invoice module change — include test cases, checklist, and bug triage
evals.expected_behavior: Explicit mention of all three components confirms composition intent. Skill fires; does NOT delegate to individual leaf skills without the orchestration wrapper.
evals.must_not: Dispatch to odoo-deploy-checklist or odoo-debug directly without the qa-suite composition gate.

evals.prompt: Review this Odoo patch for me
evals.expected_behavior: Pure code review intent. odoo-qa-suite does NOT fire. Routes to odoo-code-review.
evals.must_not: Launch the QA pipeline for a patch review request.

evals.prompt: Pre-deploy checklist for our Odoo 17 go-live this weekend
evals.expected_behavior: Deploy gate only — no test-case generation or bug triage requested. Routes to odoo-deploy-checklist directly, not to the full qa-suite composition.
evals.must_not: Launch the three-phase QA pipeline for a standalone checklist request.

evals.prompt: Generate test cases for the Odoo purchase approval workflow
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 1 (generate-tests) produces a table with >= 4 test cases covering: (a) happy path — approval flow completes normally, (b) edge case — approval with zero-value PO, (c) error path — approver rejects with mandatory comment missing, (d) permission check — user without approval rights cannot approve. Each test name states a business rule, not a function name.
evals.must_not: Produce test names like 'test_approve_po' without a business-rule description. Omit any of the four mandatory path types.

evals.prompt: What tests should I write for the custom_inventory_forecasting module?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill fires (test-generation intent matches). Phase 1 produces test cases with a Pass/Fail column. Every test case must have an identifiable WRONG answer scenario — if a test cannot fail for a specific reason, it is excluded from the output.
evals.must_not: Include a test case that always passes regardless of the system state (ETHOS#11: test that cannot be red is useless).

evals.prompt: Run QA suite for sale module — I want tests and a checklist but I have no bugs to triage
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 2 (qa-checklist) dispatches to odoo-deploy-checklist via NL. odoo-qa-suite does NOT inline the 8-domain checklist logic itself — it delegates. Phase 3 (bug-triage) is skipped cleanly with message 'No bugs to triage'. Summary notes that triage was skipped.
evals.must_not: Reproduce the 8-domain checklist inline without delegating to odoo-deploy-checklist. Proceed to a triage phase when no bugs were provided.

evals.prompt: Triage this bug: Invoice confirmation crashes with ValueError in account.move._post() — happens every time on Odoo 17 prod
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 3 assigns severity=Critical (core financial flow crash, no workaround). Output includes: severity=Critical with rationale, step-by-step repro, suspected module=account, suspected layer=Business logic, suggested next step=odoo-debug for runtime investigation.
evals.must_not: Assign severity lower than Critical for a crash in a core financial flow. Omit reproduction steps or suspected module.

evals.prompt: Triage: the 'Send by Email' button on the invoice form is slightly misaligned on mobile — low priority cosmetic issue
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 3 assigns severity=Low (cosmetic, no business-flow impact, UI layer). Output includes severity=Low with rationale citing cosmetic/no-workaround-needed, suspected layer=UI.
evals.must_not: Assign severity higher than Low for a cosmetic alignment issue. Severity must reflect business impact, not code complexity.

evals.prompt: Full QA suite for purchase module — OSM server is offline
evals.expected_behavior: Skill fires in standalone mode. Phase 1 (test-case gen) completes normally (no MCP needed). Phase 2 dispatches odoo-deploy-checklist in standalone mode — Domain 1 OSM-dependent rows are marked as 'Manual check'. Phase 3 (bug-triage) runs inline without odoo-debug dispatch. Summary includes the standalone-mode notice at the top.
evals.must_not: Block Phase 1 or Phase 3 due to OSM being offline. Fail entirely when OSM is unreachable.

evals.prompt: Generate acceptance tests for the Odoo HR leave management module and triage these 2 bugs: (1) Leave balance goes negative after approval, (2) Leave form does not save when start date equals end date
evals.expected_behavior: Phase 1 produces test table saved to .odoo-ai/qa/<slug>-test-cases.md. Phase 2 dispatches checklist. Phase 3 triages both bugs: bug 1 = High or Critical (financial/data integrity — leave balance corrupted), bug 2 = Medium (form save failure with specific edge case, workaround exists). All three output files written to .odoo-ai/qa/. Final summary at .odoo-ai/qa/<slug>-qa-summary.md.
evals.must_not: Write output to any directory other than .odoo-ai/qa/. Mix both bugs into a single unstructured paragraph instead of separate triage entries.
